mapper.select: SELECT /* LgsNstepIfMapper.getLinkDataDtlInfo */ IF_QUE_NUM AS ifQueNum , CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , APPL_END_DTTM AS applEndDttm , APPL_STRT_DTTM AS applStrtDttm , OPEN_DT AS openDt , EXCH_DT AS exchDt , CNTPNT_CD AS cntpntCd , CNTPNT_STAT_CD AS cntpntStatCd , RSV_CNTPNT_CD AS rsvCntpntCd , RSV_CNTPNT_STAT_CD AS rsvCntpntStatCd , EVNT_CD AS evntCd , EVNT_RSN_CD AS evntRsnCd , PRDT_TYPE_CD AS prdtTypeCd , RPRS_PRDT_ID AS rprsPrdtId , PRDT_ID AS prdtId , PRDT_SRL_NUM AS prdtSrlNum , OLD_YN AS oldYn , IMEI AS imei , WIFI_MAC_ID AS wifiMacId , SNR_CD AS snrCd , MYCP_YN AS mycpYn , INV_STAT_CD AS invStatCd , NORG_INV_STAT_CD AS norgInvStatCd , PRV_CNTPNT_CD AS prvCntpntCd , PRV_EVNT_CD AS prvEvntCd , PRV_EVNT_RSN_CD AS prvEvntRsnCd , PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID AS prvRprsPrdtId , PRV_PRDT_ID AS prvPrdtId , PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM AS prvPrdtSrlNum , PRV_OLD_YN AS prvOldYn , PRV_SNR_CD AS prvSnrCd , PRV_MYCP_YN AS prvMycpYn , PRV_INV_STAT_CD AS prvInvStatCd , NORG_PRV_INV_STAT_CD AS norgPrvInvStatCd , PROC_YN AS procYn , CUS_YN AS cusYn , PO_YN AS poYn , HST_YN AS hstYn , RST_YN AS rstYn , RTN_YN AS rtnYn , EXCH_YN AS exchYn , MDL_YN AS mdlYn , CASE WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('NAC','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD = '39' AND HST_YN = 'N' AND INV_STAT_CD = 'REG' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'WAT' THEN 'NAC' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('NAC','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD = '39' AND HST_YN = 'N' AND INV_STAT_CD = 'RSV' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'WAT' THEN 'NAC' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('C07','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD = '30' AND CNTPNT_CD = PRV_CNTPNT_CD AND HST_YN = 'Y' AND EXCH_YN = 'Y' AND PRV_EVNT_CD != 'CAN' AND OLD_YN = PRV_OLD_YN AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID AND PRDT_SRL_NUM != PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM AND INV_STAT_CD = 'REG' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' THEN 'C07' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('C07','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD IN ('11','13') AND PRV_EVNT_CD != 'CAN' AND INV_STAT_CD = 'REG' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' THEN 'C07' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('C07','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD IN ('01') AND (PRV_EVNT_CD != 'CAN' OR PRV_EVNT_CD IS NULL) AND NORG_INV_STAT_CD = 'REG' AND (NORG_PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' OR (NORG_PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'WAT' AND OPEN_MDL_YN = 'N')) THEN 'C07' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('C07','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD IN ('07') AND HST_YN = 'Y' AND PRV_EVNT_CD = 'C07' AND PRV_EVNT_RSN_CD IN ( '01', '30' ) -- 이전상태가 우수기변 혹은 AS기변 AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID AND PRDT_SRL_NUM = PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM AND NORG_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' AND NORG_PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' THEN 'C07' WHEN EVNT_CD = 'CAN' AND HST_YN = 'Y' AND PRV_EVNT_CD != 'CAN' AND CNTPNT_CD = PRV_CNTPNT_CD AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID AND PRDT_SRL_NUM = PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM AND INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'SLS' THEN 'CAN' WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('RCL','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD = '44' AND HST_YN = 'Y' AND RST_YN = 'Y' AND PRV_EVNT_CD = 'CAN' AND PRV_EVNT_RSN_CD = '00' AND CNTPNT_CD = PRV_CNTPNT_CD AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID AND PRDT_SRL_NUM = PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM THEN 'RCL' ELSE 'DEL' END AS aplEvntCd , CASE WHEN EVNT_CD IN ('NAC','UPD','UPS') AND EVNT_RSN_CD = '39' AND HST_YN = 'N' AND INV_STAT_CD = 'RSV' AND PRV_INV_STAT_CD = 'WAT' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS takeYn , ( SELECT REQ.REQUEST_KEY FROM MSP_REQUEST REQ , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO RSL WHERE REQ.REQUEST_KEY = RSL.REQUEST_KEY AND REQ.PSTATE = '00' AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'PO' AND RSL.MODEL_ID = MST.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND REQ.REQ_PHONE_SN = MST.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS requestKey , ( SELECT AMT.OUT_UNIT_PRIC FROM CMN_HNDST_AMT AMT , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL WHERE AMT.RPRS_PRDT_ID = MDL.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND APPL_STRT_DTTM BETWEEN AMT.UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM AND AMT.UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM AND AMT.OLD_YN = MST.OLD_YN AND MDL.PRDT_ID = MST.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS unitPric , USER_ID AS userId , OPEN_MDL_YN AS openMdlYn FROM ( SELECT MST.IF_QUE_NUM , MST.CONTRACT_NUM , MST.APPL_END_DTTM , MST.APPL_STRT_DTTM , MST.OPEN_DT , MST.EXCH_DT , MST.CNTPNT_CD , CASE WHEN ORG.ORGN_ID IS NULL THEN 'NON' WHEN ORG.TYPE_CD != '20' THEN 'NSL' WHEN ORG.ORGN_STAT_CD != '4' THEN 'NLV' ELSE 'CLR' END AS CNTPNT_STAT_CD , PRV.RSV_ORGN_ID AS RSV_CNTPNT_CD , CASE WHEN ORS.ORGN_ID IS NULL THEN 'NON' WHEN ORS.TYPE_CD != '20' THEN 'NSL' WHEN ORS.ORGN_STAT_CD != '4' THEN 'NLV' ELSE 'CLR' END AS RSV_CNTPNT_STAT_CD , MST.EVNT_CD , MST.EVNT_RSN_CD , MDL.PRDT_TYPE_CD , MST.RPRS_PRDT_ID , PRV.PRDT_ID , MST.PRDT_SRL_NUM , PRV.OLD_YN , MST.IMEI , MST.WIFI_MAC_ID , PRV.SNR_CD , PRV.SNR_IND , NVL(PRV.MYCP_YN, 'X') AS MYCP_YN , CASE WHEN MST.CNTPNT_CD = PRV.ORGN_ID AND SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z11' AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' THEN 'REG' WHEN MST.CNTPNT_CD = PRV.RSV_ORGN_ID AND SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z12' AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'PD' THEN 'RSV' WHEN MST.CNTPNT_CD = PRV.RSV_ORGN_ID AND SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z15' AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' THEN 'RSV' WHEN MST.CNTPNT_CD = PRV.ORGN_ID AND SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z13' AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' THEN 'SLS' ELSE 'DEL' END AS INV_STAT_CD , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z11' -- 입고 AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' -- 대리점 THEN 'REG' -- 입고단말 WHEN SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z12' -- 출고 AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'PD' -- 물류센터 THEN 'RSV' -- 예정단말 WHEN SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z15' -- 예정 AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' THEN 'RSV' -- 예정단말 WHEN SUBSTR(PRV.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z13' -- 판매 AND PRV.SNR_IND = 'AG' THEN 'SLS' -- 판매단말 ELSE 'DEL' -- 처리불가단말 END AS NORG_INV_STAT_CD , MST.PRV_CNTPNT_CD , MST.PRV_EVNT_CD , MST.PRV_EVNT_RSN_CD , MST.PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID , NXT.PRDT_ID AS PRV_PRDT_ID , MST.PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM , NXT.OLD_YN AS PRV_OLD_YN , NXT.SNR_CD AS PRV_SNR_CD , NXT.SNR_IND AS PRV_SNR_IND , NVL(NXT.MYCP_YN, 'X') AS PRV_MYCP_YN , CASE WHEN MST.HST_YN = 'N' THEN 'WAT' WHEN MST.PRV_CNTPNT_CD = NXT.ORGN_ID AND SUBSTR(NXT.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z13' THEN 'SLS' ELSE 'DEL' END AS PRV_INV_STAT_CD , CASE WHEN MST.HST_YN = 'N' THEN 'WAT' -- 처리가능단말 WHEN SUBSTR(NXT.SNR_CD,0,3) = 'Z13' -- 판매 THEN 'SLS' -- 판매단말 ELSE 'DEL' -- 처리불가단말 END AS NORG_PRV_INV_STAT_CD , MST.PROC_YN , MST.CUS_YN , MST.PO_YN , MST.HST_YN , MST.RST_YN , MST.RTN_YN , CASE WHEN CEIL(TO_DATE(EXCH_DT,'YYYYMMDD HH24MISS') - TO_DATE(APPL_STRT_DTTM,'YYYYMMDD HH24MISS')) >= 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS EXCH_YN , DECODE(MDL.RPRS_PRDT_ID, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS MDL_YN , MST.USER_ID , NVL(( SELECT DISTINCT 'Y' FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = MST.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_CHN_CD = '39' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CMN_INTM_MDL WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = A.MODEL_ID AND PRDT_TYPE_CD = '01' ) ), 'N') AS OPEN_MDL_YN FROM ( SELECT COM.IF_QUE_NUM , COM.SVC_CT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM , '99991231235959' AS APPL_END_DTTM , NVL(JUO.EVNT_TRTM_DT,NVL(COM.SVC_OPEN_DTTM,TO_CHAR(COM.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))) AS APPL_STRT_DTTM , SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , ( SELECT MAX(APPL_STRT_DTTM) FROM LGS_OPEN_PROC_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = COM.SVC_CT_NUM AND EVNT_RSN_CD IN ('01','11','13','39') ) AS EXCH_DT , NVL(( SELECT ORGN_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE TYPE_CD = '20' START WITH ORGN_ID = COM.DEALER_CODE CONNECT BY PRIOR HGHR_ORGN_CD = ORGN_ID ), SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS CNTPNT_CD , COM.NSTEP_ACT_CD AS EVNT_CD , JUO.MODEL_CHN_CD AS EVNT_RSN_CD , CASE WHEN COM.NSTEP_ACT_CD = 'CAN' THEN OPN.PRDT_ID ELSE COM.PRDT_ID END AS RPRS_PRDT_ID , CASE WHEN COM.NSTEP_ACT_CD = 'CAN' THEN OPN.PRDT_SRL_NUM ELSE COM.PRDT_SRL_NUM END AS PRDT_SRL_NUM , SUB.IMEI , SUB.WIFI_MAC_ID , OPN.CNTPNT_CD AS PRV_CNTPNT_CD , OPN.EVNT_CD AS PRV_EVNT_CD , OPN.EVNT_RSN_CD AS PRV_EVNT_RSN_CD , OPN.PRDT_ID AS PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID , OPN.PRDT_SRL_NUM AS PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM , CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(NVL(JUO.EVNT_TRTM_DT,TO_CHAR(COM.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')),0,8),'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(NVL(OPN.APPL_STRT_DTTM,'99991231235959'),0,8),'YYYYMMDD') >= 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RST_YN , DECODE(SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS CUS_YN , DECODE(SUB.PPPO, 'PO', 'Y', 'N') AS PO_YN , CASE WHEN COM.NSTEP_ACT_CD IN ('NAC','C07','CAN','RCL','UPD','UPS') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PROC_YN , DECODE(OPN.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS HST_YN , CASE WHEN CEIL(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(NVL(COM.SVC_OPEN_DTTM,TO_CHAR(COM.REG_DTTM,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')),0,8),'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD')) >= 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS RTN_YN , NVL(COM.TRTM_PRSN_ID, OPN.REGST_ID) AS USER_ID FROM LGS_TELECOM_IF COM , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO JUO , LGS_OPEN_PROC_INFO OPN WHERE COM.SVC_CT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND COM.SVC_CT_NUM = JUO.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND COM.NSTEP_ACT_CD = JUO.EVNT_CD(+) AND COM.SVC_OPEN_DTTM = JUO.EVNT_TRTM_DT(+) AND COM.SVC_CT_NUM = OPN.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND OPN.APPL_END_DTTM(+) = '99991231235959' AND COM.IF_QUE_NUM = #{ifQueNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) MST , CMN_INTM_MDL MDL , ( SELECT MS.ORGN_ID , ( SELECT IN_ORGN_ID FROM LGS_INOUT WHERE INOUT_ID = MS.LAST_INOUT_ID ) AS RSV_ORGN_ID , MS.RPRS_PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_SRL_NUM , MS.OLD_YN , MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD AS SNR_CD , CD.ETC1 AS SNR_JOB , CD.ETC3 AS SNR_IND , CD.ETC2 AS SNR_YN , 'Y' AS MYCP_YN FROM LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST MS , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'LGS1000' UNION SELECT MS.IN_ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID , '' AS RSV_ORGN_ID , MS.RPRS_PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_SRL_NUM , MS.OLD_YN , MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD AS SNR_CD , CD.ETC1 AS SNR_JOB , CD.ETC3 AS SNR_IND , CD.ETC2 AS SNR_YN , 'N' AS MYCP_YN FROM LGS_OTCP_SRL_MST MS , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'LGS1000' ) PRV , ( SELECT MS.ORGN_ID , ( SELECT IN_ORGN_ID FROM LGS_INOUT WHERE INOUT_ID = MS.LAST_INOUT_ID ) AS RSV_ORGN_ID , MS.RPRS_PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_SRL_NUM , MS.OLD_YN , MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD AS SNR_CD , CD.ETC1 AS SNR_JOB , CD.ETC3 AS SNR_IND , CD.ETC2 AS SNR_YN , 'Y' AS MYCP_YN FROM LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST MS , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'LGS1000' UNION SELECT MS.IN_ORGN_ID AS ORGN_ID , '' AS RSV_ORGN_ID , MS.RPRS_PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_ID , MS.PRDT_SRL_NUM , MS.OLD_YN , MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD AS SNR_CD , CD.ETC1 AS SNR_JOB , CD.ETC3 AS SNR_IND , CD.ETC2 AS SNR_YN , 'N' AS MYCP_YN FROM LGS_OTCP_SRL_MST MS , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE MS.LOGIS_PROC_STAT_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'LGS1000' ) NXT , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ORG , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST ORS WHERE MST.RPRS_PRDT_ID = MDL.PRDT_ID(+) AND MDL.RPRS_YN(+) = 'Y' AND MST.RPRS_PRDT_ID = PRV.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND MST.PRDT_SRL_NUM = PRV.PRDT_SRL_NUM(+) AND MST.CNTPNT_CD = ORG.ORGN_ID(+) AND MST.PRV_RPRS_PRDT_ID = NXT.RPRS_PRDT_ID(+) AND MST.PRV_PRDT_SRL_NUM = NXT.PRDT_SRL_NUM(+) AND MST.PRV_CNTPNT_CD = ORS.ORGN_ID(+) ) MST WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT /* LgsNstepIfMapper.getLinkNonProcData */ COM.IF_QUE_NUM FROM LGS_TELECOM_IF COM WHERE COM.LGS_PRCS_YN = 'N' ORDER BY COM.REG_DTTM ASC
SELECT /* LgsNstepIfMapper.getInvtSrl */ FN_GET_LGS_BIZ_ID(#{value}) AS value FROM DUAL
mapper.update: UPDATE /* LgsNstepIfMapper.updOpenHstInfo */ LGS_OPEN_PROC_INFO SET CHNG_DTTM = SYSDATE , APPL_END_DTTM = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{applStrtDttm, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')-1/(24*60*60),'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , CHNG_ID = #{userId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231235959'
